## Debt Item
Describe the current technical debt clearly.

## Impact
What risk or cost does this create? (bugs, performance, velocity, etc.)

## Proposed Remediation
What should be changed?

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code updated
- [ ] Tests updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Docs updated (if applicable)

## References
Related files, PRs, incidents, or issues.
